subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of Abdu'l-Baha! All the letters which thou didst request have been written and are being dispatched. Regarding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء جمیع مکاتیب که خواسته بودید مرقوم گردید و ارسال میشود در خصوص
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
